content.text:
Remember this external Jira record as project context, not as an internal Gromozeka follow-up.

Jira: MV-344
Type: Story
Title: Add Hebrew invoice import validation
Assignee: Lev
Status: In Progress
Priority: High
Acceptance criteria: uploaded Hebrew invoices must keep original RTL text and report validation errors with row numbers.
